text: We provide full export of all customer assets via API and UI: raw data, configurations, models, workflows, and audit logs. Exports are in standard, machine-readable formats (JSON/CSV/SQL) with documented schemas. No proprietary lock-in.

We offer migration tooling, documentation, and hands-on assistance. Typical migrations complete within defined timelines based on data size. We can provide references of past migrations (including to competitors) and lessons learned.
All export capabilities and any limitations are transparently documented. There are no additional fees for standard data export. Any non-exportable items (if any) are minimal and clearly justified.
Data portability is API-first with bulk export and pagination support, enabling continuous access and incremental migration. Customers can run parallel systems during transition without disruption.
We support export of core data, but configurations, models, or logs may have limited or manual export options.
Exports are available, but formats may include some proprietary structures or lack full schema documentation.
We provide basic documentation for migration, but limited hands-on support or tooling.
It is not clearly defined whether all components (e.g., audit logs, workflows, models) are exportable.
Why would you want to leave our platform?
Migration is complex and typically requires significant effort without clear tooling or support.
Data export is available but requires additional fees or premium support.
No customers have ever left our platform.
